TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Nigeria, title = Nigeria, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nigeria} }

S.FORM: Nigeria hya' ga cyux maki' tay 10 00 N, 8 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 923,768 sq km (maki' tay 32ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 910,768 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 13,000 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 186,053,386. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 78% , lhlahuy hya' ga 9.50%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 12.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Abuja. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 1 na tay mawpuw byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Muhammadu Buhari, aring ryax 29 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Nigeria hya' ga cyux maki' tay 10 00 N, 8 00 E na Xweco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 923,768 sq km (maki' tay 32ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 910,768 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 13,000 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 186,053,386. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 78% , lhlahuy hya' ga 9.50%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 12.50%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Abuja. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 1 na tay mawpuw byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Muhammadu Buhari, aring ryax 29 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: ni…£eria ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, * ** e na xwe ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a **,*** s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a ***,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a aő≤uja. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a * na taj mawpuw ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a muńßamma*u ő≤uńßari, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
